ogTitle: Wokurna vs Wombats Rest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wokurna and Wombats Rest.
heading: Wokurna vs Wombats Rest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wokurna, South Australia and Wombats Rest, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wombats Rest has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wokurna (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wokurna or Wombats Rest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wokurna has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Wombats Rest scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wokurna scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Wombats Rest scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wokurna or Wombats Rest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wombats Rest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
